name: linConfigureResponse
title: linConfigureResponse
syntax: dword linConfigureResponse(dword frameId, dword dlc, byte[] responseData); // form 1
description: Configures a response frame of a LIN node if no database is used.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description: ID of the LIN frame which will be configured as response. Value range: 0..63

parameters.name: dlc
parameters.description: Number of data bytes contained in the frame (Data Length Code). Value range: 0..8

parameters.name: responseData
parameters.description: An array of bytes which contains the response data to be set.

parameters.name: frame
parameters.description: The LIN frame which will be configured as response.

return: Returns 1 if the configuration of the response succeeded, otherwise 0.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
